prompt: Surreal, dark cinematic, ethereal portrait. Close-up from chest upward of a woman with the features of the reference image, head tilted back, eyes closed, expression of freedom and release. She wears a long-sleeve blouse made of organic, layered deep matte black raven feathers, with large black hoop earrings. Her hair is loose, dynamically suspended, blowing upward and forward by wind, dissolving into feathers and hair merging with black ink splatters, charcoal dust, and wisps of dark smoke. Fine black ink splatters and wisps spread across her face and neck. Background: smoky gray moody atmosphere, thick dense layered smoke swirling throughout the frame. High-resolution, cinematic moody lighting diffused through smoke.
